entity.name: Zhang Pengerang Industrial Sdn. Bhd.
entity.type: Malaysian Private Limited Company — PropCo / JV Vehicle
entity.taxElection: Malaysian Corporate Tax — 24% standard rate; pioneer status application pending under MIDA (Promotion of Investments Act 1986) for industrial park development; Real Property Gains Tax (RPGT) exposure on disposal; GoWell Malaysia is future anchor tenant, not an owner

owners.name: Zhang Xi / Zhang Family Trust (BVI)
owners.notes: Ultimate economic interest via Zhang Family Trust BVI vehicle; Zhang controls development decisions and holds first call on anchor-tenant lease economics

owners.name: PIPC Petroleum Infrastructure Partners Consortium
owners.notes: Malaysian entity with MPKT (Majlis Perbandaran Kota Tinggi) planning relationships and local contractor network; strategic for EIA compliance, Bomba approval, and MIDA engagement

capitalContributions.notes: Land acquisition Phase 1 plots (7.2 ha); Zhang 70% equity contribution; freehold title registered to Zhang Pengerang Industrial Sdn. Bhd.
Land acquisition Phase 1 plots (7.2 ha); PIPC 30% equity contribution
Land acquisition Phase 2 plots (8.1 ha); Zhang 70% equity contribution
Land acquisition Phase 2 plots (8.1 ha); PIPC 30% equity contribution
Maybank development land facility fully drawn — MYR 6.63M equivalent; borrower: Zhang Pengerang Industrial Sdn. Bhd.; GoWell Malaysia corporate guarantee provided as additional security
EIA study (DoE-approved Nov 2025) + topographic survey + MPKT planning application fees; expensed as pre-development cost

debtSummary.amortisation: Interest-only during pre-development phase; bullet repayment at maturity or refinance into construction facility upon planning approval
debtSummary.covenants: Land valuation floor at MYR 15M; MPKT planning approval milestone (Dec 2026 target); minimum equity injection by Zhang/PIPC before construction drawdown; GoWell Malaysia anchor pre-lease required before construction facility activation
debtSummary.security: First fixed charge over freehold land title (Lot PTD 24681 and contiguous lots); corporate guarantee from GoWell Energy Solutions Pte. Ltd. (Singapore parent); personal guarantee from Zhang Xi (limited, burn-off on planning approval)
debtSummary.notes: Maybank facility converts to construction loan upon MPKT planning approval and signed GoWell anchor pre-lease; undrawn construction tranche MYR 18M committed but not drawn — subject to planning milestone

guaranteesObligations.notes: GoWell Singapore OpCo corporate guarantee for Maybank land facility; Maybank requires disclosure and prior consent if GoWell undergoes material change in ownership structure (U.S. listing is a triggering event); this guarantee must be disclosed in U.S. listing prospectus as a contingent liability of the operating company
Limited personal guarantee from Zhang Xi; burn-off trigger: MPKT planning approval and execution of GoWell Malaysia anchor pre-lease; expected burn-off Q2 2027

guaranteesObligations.guarantor: Zhang Pengerang Industrial Sdn. Bhd. / PIPC JV
guaranteesObligations.notes: MYR 18M undrawn construction facility committed by Maybank, subject to: (1) MPKT planning approval, (2) signed GoWell Malaysia anchor pre-lease (12–15 year term), (3) minimum equity injection confirmation by Zhang and PIPC. Drawing this facility without GoWell pre-lease in place would breach Maybank covenants.
